narrative:
Decatur (precinct in Washington County) has 969 registered voters, with 57.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 32.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 10.6%, a pronounced Republican lean of 21.6 percentage points.
